description: Simplified form for caste or community certificate guidance.

help.english: Enter the applicant's full name as per official record.
help.telugu: దరఖాస్తుదారుడి పూర్తి పేరు official record ప్రకారం టైప్ చేయండి.
help.hindi: आवेदक का पूरा नाम official record के अनुसार लिखें.

help.english: Enter parent full name as per records.
help.telugu: Recordలో ఉన్నట్టు parent పూర్తి పేరు టైప్ చేయండి.
help.hindi: Record के अनुसार parent का पूरा नाम लिखें.

help.english: Choose the certificate type requested by your school, college, office, or scheme.
help.telugu: School, college, office లేదా scheme అడిగిన certificate type ఎంచుకోండి.
help.hindi: School, college, office या scheme ने जो certificate type माँगा है उसे चुनें.

help.english: Enter relation such as son, daughter, wife, or husband if asked.
help.telugu: అడిగితే son, daughter, wife, husband వంటి సంబంధం టైప్ చేయండి.
help.hindi: पूछा जाए तो son, daughter, wife, husband जैसा रिश्ता लिखें.

help.english: Enter your mandal. Ask with village or pincode if unsure.
help.telugu: మీ మండలం టైప్ చేయండి. తెలియకపోతే village లేదా pincode చెప్పి అడగండి.
help.hindi: अपना मंडल लिखें. नहीं पता हो तो village या pincode बताकर पूछें.

help.english: Enter why you need the certificate, such as scholarship or admission.
help.telugu: Certificate ఎందుకు కావాలో టైప్ చేయండి. ఉదాహరణకు scholarship లేదా admission.
help.hindi: Certificate किस काम के लिए चाहिए लिखें, जैसे scholarship या admission.
पहचान के लिए Aadhaar upload करें.

help.english: Upload any available caste or community proof such as parent certificate or school record.
help.telugu: Parent caste certificate లేదా school record వంటి caste/community proof ఉంటే upload చేయండి.
help.hindi: Parent caste certificate या school record जैसा caste/community proof हो तो upload करें.
वर्तमान पते का proof upload करें.

english: Which caste proof should I upload?
hindi: caste proof kya upload karna hai?
